series_description: Chemist''s daily reports shows whether the urine, blood, or saliva samples were negative.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current and previous year ; Electronic: retain current year and previous year

series_description: a. Purpose of this record is for reference to proposed, adopted, not adopted rules.
retention_statement: Paper: 1 year plus current year

series_title: LIST OF THOROUGHBRED & STANDARDBRED ADVISORY COMMITTEES
series_description: LIST OF THOROUGHBRED & STANDARDBRED ADVISORY COMMITTEES
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 4 years.

series_description: Contains past performances of horses racing that night.
retention_statement: Paper: Current and previous year.

series_description: These are a summary of all licenses and fingerprints issued that are submitted by our inspectors.
retention_statement: Paper: Current plus 2 previous years.

series_description: Documents sent from FBI and BCI as a result of fingerprinting. These include confidential information such as social security numbers and arrest records.
retention_statement: Paper: Current year and 4 previous years

series_description: Import and Export simulcast signals for each permit holder which is approved by the Ohio State Racing Commission
retention_statement: Paper: The current calendar year and the previous calendar year

series_description: Applications provided by the Commission that are filled out by the permit holders on a yearly basis. These are approved by the Racing Commission. These consist of dates requested to conduct horse racing, officers of the permit holder, stockholders and other important data of the permit holder''s racing operation
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 3 calendar years

series_description: The information is taken from the application submitted by the licensees. b) These documents will be kept in the database.
retention_statement: Electronic: The current year plus four previous years

series_description: Purchase Order documents and records pertaining to expenses of the agency that exceed $2,500.00 which can include storeroom requisitions and printing requisitions or other items.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 complete fiscal years plus current year providing audit by Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies resolved than destroy . ; Electronic: .2 complete fiscal years plus current year providing audit by Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies resolved than destroy .

series_description: This is the record that shows payment of agency expenses; the actual bill and the listing of expenses are attached where appropriate; payroll records are also covered by this schedule.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 complete fiscal years plus current year providing audit by Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies resolved than destroy . ; Electronic: 2 complete fiscal years plus current year providing audit by Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies resolved than destroy .

series_description: This record shows current deposits made to the State Treasurer. The record shows source of receipts and total amount of deposit.
retention_statement: Paper: 2 complete fiscal years plus current year providing audit by Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies resolved than destroy . ; Electronic: 2 complete fiscal years plus current year providing audit by Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies resolved than destroy .

series_description: This is a card signed by the Veterinarian, a witness, and a urine catcher (if collected) after blood and urine samples are collected.
retention_statement: Paper: Current year plus 3 months ; Electronic: current year plus 3 months

series_title: STEWARDS OR JUDGES DAILY REPORTS AND RULINGS
series_description: Contains Stewards and Judges rulings and daily reports at all tracks.
retention_statement: Paper: Current year and two previous years retained and ; Electronic: Current year and two previous years retained and

series_description: Chemist''''''''s daily report shows whether the urine or blood samples were positive.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current year and two previous years. Records are made a part of case history in appealed cases. ; Electronic: Retain current year and two previous years. Records are made a part of case history in appealed cases.

series_description: a) Shows the breakdown of the pari-mutuel wagering at each track.
retention_statement: Paper: This is an in house data base that is not audited and will be retained for three years. ; Electronic: This is an in house data base that is not audited and will be retained for three years.

series_description: Personal Service contracts entered into with state veterinarians, state stewards, state presiding judges, hearing officers, dept. of agriculture and any others on behalf of the Racing Commission.
retention_statement: Paper: current fiscal year plus 2 additional Fiscal years providing audit by the Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: current fiscal year plus 2 additional Fiscal years providing audit by the Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Record of all incoming monies received by the Commission.
retention_statement: Electronic: current fiscal year plus 2 additional Fiscal years providing audit by the Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: current fiscal year plus 2 additional Fiscal years providing audit by the Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Needed for Balancing of Combined Simulcast Purse Fund. 3769.089(f)
retention_statement: Paper: current fiscal year plus 2 additional Fiscal years providing audit by the Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: current fiscal year plus 2 additional Fiscal years providing audit by the Auditor of State is completed and audit report is released with all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Purpose of this file is to provide a copy of the Annual Report which have been sent to the Governor.
retention_statement: Paper: Continuaously maintained and updated in Agency File. After five years a paper copy is transferred to state archives ; Electronic: Continuously maintained and updated in Agency File. After five years a copy is transferred to state archives

series_title: Executive Secretary''s agenda information to all commissioners
series_description: Executive Secretary sends information regarding items on the commission''s agenda so the commissioners can review before the commission meeting
retention_statement: Electronic: 5 years. ; Paper: Destroy after scanned to commission database

series_description: a) Applications; b) Renewal Forms; c) Reports on Mares bred to Stallions; d) Affidavit of Ohio residency; e) form on each horse registered; f) Yearly record book of stallions registered.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office file 30 years

series_description: a) Applications; b) Record of ownership; c) form on each horse registered; d) Ohio Owner Affidavits; e) Yearly record book of horses registered; f) Inspection cards of horses registered.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office file 30 years, review by State Archives.

series_description: a) Purpose of this file is to provide reference in checking or investigating the horsemen. b) The applications contain the description, arrest record, address, horses owned, and various other information that is pertinent to this commission. This file is used daily by the office personnel.
retention_statement: Paper: Current and 1 previous year unless application is transferred to the hearing file. ; Electronic: Current and 1 previous years unless application is transferred to the hearing file.

series_description: Electronic recordings of Commission meetings. Electronic and paper copy of the transcript of the commission meeting
retention_statement: Electronic: 1 year plus current. ; Paper: 1 year plus current

series_description: Contains files of various persons who have appealed a steward or judges ruling. .
retention_statement: Paper: Continuously maintained and updated in Agency files. Keep for five years than destroy

series_description: Proceedings of Commission meetings.
retention_statement: Paper: Continually maintained and updated in Agency File. At end of 3 calendar years transfer a copy of minutes to State Archives. ; Electronic: Continually maintained and updated in Agency File. At end of 3 calendar years transfer a copy of minutes to State Archives.

series_description: Thoroughbred Program information contain past performances of horses entered to race. Also contains owners and trainers of horses and this is available to the betting public.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for current year and one previous year.

series_title: Reporting Notice of Disease or Death of a Horse
series_description: This form gives notice to the Commission of a contagious or infectious disease for a horse at the permit holder premises. The form gives notice for the death and disposal of a horse which occurs at the permit holder''s premises
retention_statement: Paper: The current year plus three prior years ; Electronic: The current year plus three prior years

series_description: These are the transcripts from Commission Meetings
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current year and previous 2 years review by State for possible transfer' ; Electronic: retain current year and previous two years review by State Archives for possible transfer'

series_description: Information collected for Broodmares for Standardbred Horses
retention_statement: Paper: Retain current year and previous year ; Electronic: retain current year and previous year
